# Saudi Arabia

**Summary**: Geographic study area or location in the thesis collection.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-alqubalee|Alqubalee, 2017]] conducted research at Saudi Arabia

- [[1995-al-jaziri|Al-Jaziri, 1995]] studied samples from Saudi Arabian oil fields.
